question.stem: A university research group shares anonymized participant data and two systems interpret the same numeric code differently. What is the best prevention?
choices: Use a shared data dictionary and schema validation
Convert all fields to free text
question.explanation: Shared semantics and validation prevent representation mismatches. A common wrong choice is "Increase file size limits" because it sounds plausible but does not address the core condition. Takeaway: identify the exact requirement before selecting an approach.
